headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 8 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 8 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 17 high, 13 medium, 9 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Timişoara Traian Vuia (TSR/LRTR); plus 14 other bases. 13 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, mist and low cloud base  — most notably around London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Václav Havel Airport Prague (PRG/LKPR) and London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK). Network hotspots: Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Frankfurt-Hahn (HHN/EDFH), Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN), Billund (BLL/EKBI), Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY) and 3 others. Primary drivers: cold‑temperature performance penalties, low cloud base and snow / blowing snow. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Frankfurt-Hahn (HHN/EDFH), Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 8 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — HIGH: mist; visibility down to 1 km, cloud base around 100 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Timişoara Traian Vuia (TSR/LRTR) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 200 ft | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — HIGH: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; strong gusts risk | Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) — HIGH: mist; cold-temperature performance penalties; cloud base around 100 ft | Craiova (CRA/LRCV) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 100 ft and 11 others. Worst affected now: Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Frankfurt-Hahn (HHN/EDFH) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 200 m, cloud base around 0 ft (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Billund (BLL/EKBI) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; cloud base around 200 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | Leoš Janáček Airport Ostrava (OSR/LKMT) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) and 2 others. Changed since last run: Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Frankfurt-Hahn (HHN/EDFH), Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN), Billund (BLL/EKBI), Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY), Shirak (LWN/UDSG), Memmingen Allgau (FMM/EDJA), Karlsruhe Baden-Baden (FKB/EDSB), London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Aberdeen (ABZ/EGPD) and 2 others.
